trends.headline: Ollama Out-of-Bounds Read Vulnerability Allows Remote Process Memory Leak
trends.summary:
Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed a critical security vulnerability in Ollama that, if successfully exploited, could allow a remote, unauthenticated attacker to leak its entire process memory.
The out-of-bounds read flaw, which likely impacts over 300,000 servers globally, is tracked as CVE-2
